attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_EFFECTIVE_DT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SK_TRX_ID_BIGINT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE_CD,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.CUST_PRTY_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.DO_NOT_RESTATE_FLG,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EXPIRATION_DT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.APPRVD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.UPLOADED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.APPROVED_DTM,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.DV_APPROVED_DT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.UPLOADED_DTM, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.DV_UPLOADED_DT, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.VALIDATION_STATUS_REASON_DESCR, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.UPLOAD_FILE_NAME, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.PROCESSED_FLG,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SO_SUBSCR_ITEM_SALES_TRX_KEY,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.REV_TRANSFER_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SALES_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.DV_BOOKINGS_TRX_REF_ID,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.REASON_COMMENT_TXT, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.ORIGINAL_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.ORIGINAL_SLS_ACCT_GRP_PRTY_KEY, 
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SUMMARY_ADJUSTMENT_FLG,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.BK_DEAL_ID,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.FDDR_REPORTING_FLG,
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.SALES_REP_NUM,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ARCHIVE_EDW_CREATE_DTM 
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT
 where
 N_DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT.EXPIRATION_DT<=(SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =0 AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE =0) IN (1,2)
THEN (SELECT MAX( FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =1 AND FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =3)
WHEN (SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =0 AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE =0) IN (3,4) THEN
(SELECT MAX( FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =0 AND FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1)
END)
AND VALIDATION_STATUS_REASON_DESCR NOT LIKE 'AUTO-EXPIRED%'
